mapper.select: MERGE IDS2 WITH (HOLDLOCK) AS TARGET USING ( SELECT #{tableName} AS TABLE_NAME, #{condition1} AS CONDITION1, #{condition2} AS CONDITION2 ) AS SOURCE ON ( TARGET.TABLE_NAME = SOURCE.TABLE_NAME AND TARGET.CONDITION1 = SOURCE.CONDITION1 AND TARGET.CONDITION2 = SOURCE.CONDITION2 ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET NEXT_ID = TARGET.NEXT_ID + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TABLE_NAME, CONDITION1, CONDITION2, NEXT_ID) VALUES (SOURCE.TABLE_NAME, SOURCE.CONDITION1, SOURCE.CONDITION2, 1) OUTPUT INSERTED.NEXT_ID;
